windows.title: Heathrow Evening International Arrivals
windows.trigger: 9–12 long-haul flights/hour + Piccadilly line closure removes direct tube access

windows.title: Fulham vs Bournemouth — Premier League
windows.trigger: 26,500 fans at Craven Cottage. Limited tube (Putney Bridge, 10 min walk). Away fans unfamiliar with area.

windows.title: London City Airport — Morning Business Peak
windows.trigger: Friday = peak business travel. LCY passengers are predominantly expense-account travellers with very high ride-hail conversion.

windows.title: OVO Arena Wembley — ITTF World Team Championships
windows.trigger: Semi-final session. 12,500 capacity. Wembley Park station congested on egress.

windows.title: West End Evening Entertainment Egress
windows.trigger: 235 events ending across London. Friday night theatre/concert crowds + dinner spillover + nightlife compound effect.
